_comment: Prompts for generating companion characters from free-text or template.

freeText.template:
Generate a companion character for a language and culture app.

User's description: "{{description}}"
Location: {{location}}
{{dialectLine}}

Respond in exactly this JSON format and nothing else:
{
  "id": "<short-uuid>",
  "name": "<short name, 3-6 letters, culturally fitting for the location>",
  "summary": "<name> — <one sentence: personality + location + how they speak>",
  "detailed": "<2 sentences: what kinds of social situations this companion is exceptional at navigating in this city — e.g. late-night spots, bureaucracy, markets, dating scene — and how they personally handle those moments>",
  "style": "<casual|warm|energetic|mysterious|playful|dry-humor|nurturing|streetwise>",
  "emoji": "<one emoji>",
  "avatar_color": {
    "primary": "<hex color>",
    "secondary": "<hex color>",
    "accent": "<hex color>"
  },
  "avatar_accessory": "<one location/vocation-themed emoji>",
  "speaks_like": "<brief description of HOW they talk — slang level, formality, rhythm>",
  "template_id": null,
  "location_city": "{{city}}",
  "location_country": "{{country}}",
  "first_message": "<3-4 sentence greeting IN CHARACTER. Drop the user into a specific real moment in this city — a street, a situation, a vibe — like a friend texting them. Do NOT list features or say whatelp with. Just be present in the place. End with one question about what they're about to do or what's on their mind.>"
}

fromTemplate.template:
Generate a companion character based on this template.

Template: {{templateLabel}} — {{templatePersonality}}
User's customization (if any): "{{userAdditions}}"
Location: {{location}}
{{dialectLine}}

Respond in exactly this JSON format and nothing else:
{
  "id": "<short-uuid>",
  "name": "<short name fitting the template vibe + location>",
  "summary": "<name> — <one sentence combining template personality with location>",
  "detailed": "<2 sentences: what kinds of social situations this companion is exceptional at navigating in this city — e.g. late-night spots, bureaucracy, markets, dating scene — and how they personally handle those moments>",
  "style": "{{templateStyle}}",
  "emoji": "{{templateEmoji}}",
  "avatar_color": {
    "primary": "<hex color that fits the template vibe>",
    "secondary": "<hex color>",
    "accent": "<hex color>"
  },
  "avatar_accessory": "<location-themed emoji fitting the template>",
  "speaks_like": "<how they talk given template + location>",
  "template_id": "{{templateId}}",
  "location_city": "{{city}}",
  "location_country": "{{country}}",
  "first_message": "<3-4 sentence greeting IN CHARACTER. Drop the user into a specific real moment in this city — a street, a situation, a vibe — like a friend texting them. Do NOT list features or say whatelp with. Just be present in the place. End with one question about what they're about to do or what's on their mind.>"
}
